subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Lord! With my tongue, my spirit, and my innermost heart do I call upon Thee, beseeching Thee to unlock the portals of mysteries before my face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی انی ادعوک بلسانی و روحی و جنانی ان تفتح ابواب الاسرار علی وجوه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
